# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a multi-job GitHub Actions workflow where one job builds artifacts and subsequent jobs download and deploy them. The deployment job should download artifacts from the build job and execute deployment scripts. This is for our multi-stage deployment pipeline.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Multi-Stage Deployment Pipeline

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
      - release/*
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - main
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      environment:
        description: 'Deployment environment'
        required: true
        default: 'staging'
        type: choice
        options:
          - staging
          - production

env:
  BUILD_ARTIFACT_NAME: build-artifacts
  BUILD_ARTIFACT_PATH: dist/
  NODE_VERSION: '18'

jobs:
  build:
    name: Build Artifacts
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    outputs:
      build_version: ${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}
      build_sha: ${{ github.sha }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Run linting
        run: npm run lint --if-present

      - name: Run tests
        run: npm test --if-present

      - name: Generate build version
        id: version
        run: |
          VERSION="1.0.0-$(date +'%Y%m%d%H%M%S')-${GITHUB_SHA::8}"
          echo "version=$VERSION" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "Build version: $VERSION"

      - name: Build application
        run: |
          npm run build
          echo "${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}" > dist/VERSION.txt
          echo "${{ github.sha }}" > dist/BUILD_SHA.txt
        env:
          NODE_ENV: production

      - name: Generate build manifest
        run: |
          cat > dist/manifest.json << EOF
          {
            "version": "${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}",
            "commit_sha": "${{ github.sha }}",
            "branch": "${{ github.ref_name }}",
            "build_number": "${{ github.run_number }}",
            "build_timestamp": "$(date -u +'%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ')",
            "triggered_by": "${{ github.actor }}"
          }
          EOF

      - name: Upload build artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: ${{ env.BUILD_ARTIFACT_NAME }}
          path: ${{ env.BUILD_ARTIFACT_PATH }}
          retention-days: 5
          if-no-files-found: error

      - name: Upload test reports
        if: always()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: test-reports
          path: |
            coverage/
            test-results/
          retention-days: 3
          if-no-files-found: ignore

  security-scan:
    name: Security Scan
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: ${{ env.BUILD_ARTIFACT_NAME }}
          path: ${{ env.BUILD_ARTIFACT_PATH }}

      - name: Verify artifact integrity
        run: |
          echo "Verifying build artifacts..."
          if [ ! -f dist/VERSION.txt ]; then
            echo "ERROR: VERSION.txt not found in artifacts"
            exit 1
          fi
          ARTIFACT_VERSION=$(cat dist/VERSION.txt)
          echo "Artifact version: $ARTIFACT_VERSION"
          echo "Expected version: ${{ needs.build.outputs.build_version }}"
          if [ "$ARTIFACT_VERSION" != "${{ needs.build.outputs.build_version }}" ]; then
            echo "ERROR: Version mismatch!"
            exit 1
          fi

      - name: Run security scan
        run: |
          echo "Running security scan on build artifacts..."
          # Add your security scanning tool here, e.g.:
          # npm audit --production
          # trivy fs --exit-code 1 --severity HIGH,CRITICAL dist/
          echo "Security scan passed"

      - name: Upload security scan results
        if: always()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: security-scan-results
          path: security-reports/
          retention-days: 30
          if-no-files-found: ignore

  deploy-staging:
    name: Deploy to Staging
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs:
      - build
      - security-scan
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' || startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/heads/release/')
    environment:
      name: staging
      url: https://staging.example.com
    concurrency:
      group: deploy-staging
      cancel-in-progress: false
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: ${{ env.BUILD_ARTIFACT_NAME }}
          path: ${{ env.BUILD_ARTIFACT_PATH }}

      - name: List downloaded artifacts
        run: |
          echo "=== Downloaded Artifacts ==="
          find ${{ env.BUILD_ARTIFACT_PATH }} -type f | head -50
          echo ""
          echo "=== Build Manifest ==="
          cat dist/manifest.json
          echo ""
          echo "=== Build Version ==="
          cat dist/VERSION.txt

      - name: Validate deployment artifacts
        run: |
          echo "Validating artifacts for deployment..."
          EXPECTED_SHA="${{ needs.build.outputs.build_sha }}"
          ACTUAL_SHA=$(cat dist/BUILD_SHA.txt)
          if [ "$EXPECTED_SHA" != "$ACTUAL_SHA" ]; then
            echo "ERROR: Build SHA mismatch. Expected $EXPECTED_SHA, got $ACTUAL_SHA"
            exit 1
          fi
          echo "Artifact validation passed"

      - name: Pre-deployment health check
        run: |
          echo "Checking staging environment health before deployment..."
          # curl -sf https://staging.example.com/health || echo "Warning: Pre-deployment health check failed"

      - name: Deploy to staging
        env:
          DEPLOY_ENV: staging
          BUILD_VERSION: ${{ needs.build.outputs.build_version }}
          DEPLOY_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.STAGING_DEPLOY_TOKEN }}
          DEPLOY_HOST: ${{ secrets.STAGING_DEPLOY_HOST }}
        run: |
          echo "Deploying version $BUILD_VERSION to $DEPLOY_ENV..."
          echo "Deploy host: $DEPLOY_HOST"

          # Example deployment scripts - replace with your actual deployment logic

          # Option 1: SCP/SSH deployment
          # scp -r dist/* $DEPLOY_HOST:/var/www/app/
          # ssh $DEPLOY_HOST "cd /var/www/app && ./restart.sh"

          # Option 2: AWS S3 + CloudFront deployment
          # aws s3 sync dist/ s3://staging-bucket/ --delete
          # aws cloudfront create-invalidation --distribution-id $CF_DIST_ID --paths "/*"

          # Option 3: Docker deployment
          # docker build -t app:$BUILD_VERSION .
          # docker push registry.example.com/app:$BUILD_VERSION
          # kubectl set image deployment/app app=registry.example.com/app:$BUILD_VERSION

          # Option 4: Generic deployment script
          chmod +x scripts/deploy.sh 2>/dev/null || true
          if [ -f scripts/deploy.sh ]; then
            ./scripts/deploy.sh --env "$DEPLOY_ENV" --version "$BUILD_VERSION" --artifact-path "${{ env.BUILD_ARTIFACT_PATH }}"
          else
            echo "No deploy script found. Simulating deployment..."
            echo "Deployment to $DEPLOY_ENV completed successfully"
          fi

      - name: Post-deployment health check
        run: |
          echo "Running post-deployment health check..."
          MAX_RETRIES=5
          RETRY_INTERVAL=10
          for i in $(seq 1 $MAX_RETRIES); do
            echo "Health check attempt $i of $MAX_RETRIES..."
            # if curl -sf https://staging.example.com/health; then
            #   echo "Health check passed!"
            #   exit 0
            # fi
            echo "Simulating health check pass on attempt $i"
            if [ $i -ge 2 ]; then
              echo "Health check passed!"
              exit 0
            fi
            echo "Retrying in $RETRY_INTERVAL seconds..."
            sleep $RETRY_INTERVAL
          done
          echo "ERROR: Health check failed after $MAX_RETRIES attempts"
          exit 1

      - name: Post-deployment notification
        if: always()
        run: |
          STATUS="${{ job.status }}"
          VERSION="${{ needs.build.outputs.build_version }}"
          echo "Staging deployment status: $STATUS for version $VERSION"
          # Send notification via Slack, Teams, etc.
          # curl -X POST ${{ secrets.SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL }} \
          #   -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
          #   -d "{\"text\":\"Staging deployment $STATUS: version $VERSION\"}"

  integration-tests:
    name: Run Integration Tests
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs:
      - build
      - deploy-staging
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Download test reports from build
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: test-reports
          path: previous-test-results/
        continue-on-error: true

      - name: Run integration tests against staging
        env:
          TEST_BASE_URL: https://staging.example.com
          BUILD_VERSION: ${{ needs.build.outputs.build_version }}
        run: |
          echo "Running integration tests against staging environment..."
          echo "Target URL: $TEST_BASE_URL"
          echo "Build version: $BUILD_VERSION"
          # npm run test:integration
          # npx playwright test
          echo "Integration tests passed"

      - name: Upload integration test results
        if: always()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: integration-test-results
          path: |
            integration-test-results/
            playwright-report/
          retention-days: 7
          if-no-files-found: ignore

  deploy-production:
    name: Deploy to Production
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs:
      - build
      - security-scan
      - deploy-staging
      - integration-tests
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' || startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/heads/release/')
    environment:
      name: production
      url: https://www.example.com
    concurrency:
      group: deploy-production
      cancel-in-progress: false
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: ${{ env.BUILD_ARTIFACT_NAME }}
          path: ${{ env.BUILD_ARTIFACT_PATH }}

      - name: Verify artifacts match build job
        run: |
          echo "=== Verifying Production Deployment Artifacts ==="
          EXPECTED_VERSION="${{ needs.build.outputs.build_version }}"
          ACTUAL_VERSION=$(cat dist/VERSION.txt)
          EXPECTED_SHA="${{ needs.build.outputs.build_sha }}"
          ACTUAL_SHA=$(cat dist/BUILD_SHA.txt)

          echo "Expected version: $EXPECTED_VERSION"
          echo "Actual version:   $ACTUAL_VERSION"
          echo "Expected SHA:     $EXPECTED_SHA"
          echo "Actual SHA:       $ACTUAL_SHA"

          if [ "$EXPECTED_VERSION" != "$ACTUAL_VERSION" ] || [ "$EXPECTED_SHA" != "$ACTUAL_SHA" ]; then
            echo "ERROR: Artifact verification failed!"
            exit 1
          fi
          echo "Artifact verification passed"

      - name: Create deployment record
        run: |
          cat > deployment-record.json << EOF
          {
            "environment": "production",
            "version": "${{ needs.build.outputs.build_version }}",
            "commit_sha": "${{ needs.build.outputs.build_sha }}",
            "deployed_by": "${{ github.actor }}",
            "deployment_timestamp": "$(date -u +'%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ')",
            "workflow_run_id": "${{ github.run_id }}",
            "workflow_run_number": "${{ github.run_number }}"
          }
          EOF
          cat deployment-record.json

      - name: Pre-deployment backup
        env:
          DEPLOY_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_DEPLOY_TOKEN }}
        run: |
          echo "Creating pre-deployment backup..."
          # Add backup logic here
          # aws s3 sync s3://production-bucket/ s3://backup-bucket/$(date +'%Y%m%d%H%M%S')/
          echo "Backup completed"

      - name: Deploy to production
        env:
          DEPLOY_ENV: production
          BUILD_VERSION: ${{ needs.build.outputs.build_version }}
          DEPLOY_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_DEPLOY_TOKEN }}
          DEPLOY_HOST: ${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_DEPLOY_HOST }}
        run: |
          echo "Deploying version $BUILD_VERSION to $DEPLOY_ENV..."

          # Blue-Green or Rolling deployment
          chmod +x scripts/deploy.sh 2>/dev/null || true
          if [ -f scripts/deploy.sh ]; then
            ./scripts/deploy.sh \
              --env "$DEPLOY_ENV" \
              --version "$BUILD_VERSION" \
              --artifact-path "${{ env.BUILD_ARTIFACT_PATH }}" \
              --strategy "rolling" \
              --max-surge "25%" \
              --max-unavailable "0"
          else
            echo "No deploy script found. Simulating production deployment..."
            echo "Step 1: Uploading artifacts..."
            echo "Step 2: Updating deployment configuration..."
            echo "Step 3: Rolling out new version..."
            echo "Step 4: Verifying deployment..."
            echo "Production deployment completed successfully"
          fi

      - name: Post-deployment health check
        run: |
          echo "Running production health checks..."
          MAX_RETRIES=10
          RETRY_INTERVAL=15
          for i in $(seq 1 $MAX_RETRIES); do
            echo "Health check attempt $i of $MAX_RETRIES..."
            # if curl -sf https://www.example.com/health; then
            #   echo "Production health check passed!"
            #   exit 0
            # fi
            echo "Simulating health check pass on attempt $i"
            if [ $i -ge 2 ]; then
              echo "Production health check passed!"
              exit 0
            fi
            echo "Retrying in $RETRY_INTERVAL seconds..."
            sleep $RETRY_INTERVAL
          done
          echo "ERROR: Production health check failed!"
          exit 1

      - name: Smoke tests
        run: |
          echo "Running production smoke tests..."
          # curl -sf https://www.example.com/ > /dev/null
          # curl -sf https://www.example.com/api/status > /dev/null
          echo "Smoke tests passed"

      - name: Upload deployment record
        if: always()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: deployment-record-production
          path: deployment-record.json
          retention-days: 90

      - name: Rollback on failure
        if: failure()
        env:
          DEPLOY_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_DEPLOY_TOKEN }}
        run: |
          echo "ERROR: Production deployment failed! Initiating rollback..."
          # Add rollback logic here
          # kubectl rollout undo deployment/app
          # aws s3 sync s3://backup-bucket/latest/ s3://production-bucket/
          chmod +x scripts/rollback.sh 2>/dev/null || true
          if [ -f scripts/rollback.sh ]; then
            ./scripts/rollback.sh --env production
          else
            echo "No rollback script found. Manual intervention may be required."
          fi

      - name: Deployment notification
        if: always()
        run: |
          STATUS="${{ job.status }}"
          VERSION="${{ needs.build.outputs.build_version }}"
          echo "Production deployment notification: $STATUS for version $VERSION"
          # curl -X POST ${{ secrets.SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL }} \
          #   -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
          #   -d "{\"text\":\"🚀 Production deployment $STATUS: version $VERSION by ${{ github.actor }}\"}"

  cleanup:
    name: Post-Deployment Cleanup
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs:
      - deploy-production
    if: always()
    steps:
      - name: Summarize pipeline results
        run: |
          echo "=== Deployment Pipeline Summary ==="
          echo "Build Version: ${{ needs.build.outputs.build_version }}"
          echo "Commit SHA: ${{ needs.build.outputs.build_sha }}"
          echo "Triggered by: ${{ github.actor }}"
          echo "Branch: ${{ github.ref_name }}"
          echo "Run ID: ${{ github.run_id }}"
          echo "=================================="
